name: [GRV-API] Service Tagging Compliance Monitor
message:
Service tagging compliance issue detected for grv-api.

Environment: {{env}}
Service: {{service}}
Compliance Issues:
- Missing required tags detected
- Inconsistent tagging across services
- May impact monitoring and alerting

Required Tags for Compliance:
- service: grv-api ✓
- env: prod ✓
- version: {{version}} (MISSING)
- team: backend (MISSING)
- owner: grv-team (MISSING)

Impact Analysis:
- Reduced monitoring effectiveness
- Difficult to filter and group metrics
- May break automated processes
- SLA tracking may be inaccurate

Remediation Steps:
1. Update ddtrace configuration
2. Ensure proper environment variables
3. Verify deployment scripts include tags
4. Check application instrumentation
5. Validate tag propagation

Tagging Guide: https://docs.datadoghq.com/getting_started/tagging/

options.escalation_message: Service tagging compliance issues persist. Monitoring effectiveness may be reduced.
